email_body:
Beste heer/mevrouw,

Met veel enthousiasme reageer ik op de vacature voor SEO Manager bij George Dimov, CPA. Uw vraag naar een specialist die organische zichtbaarheid en leadgeneratie kan stimuleren sluit naadloos aan bij mijn ervaring.

Bij Episto voer ik on-page SEO uit, van keyword research tot publicatie, en beheer ik WordPress-sites. Op mijn eigen project mirook.com pas ik gestructureerde data, entity-optimalisatie en GEO toe om zichtbaarheid in zowel traditionele als AI-zoekmachines te verbeteren. Ik werk dagelijks met Google Search Console, Google Analytics, SEMrush en Ahrefs.

Hoewel mijn ervaring in accounting beperkt is, ben ik ervan overtuigd dat mijn analytische vaardigheden en gestructureerde aanpak mij in staat stellen snel uw vakgebied te doorgronden. Ik werk zelfstandig in een remote setting en communiceer helder in het Engels.

Ik voeg mijn motivatiebrief en CV bij. Ik hoop u in een gesprek verder te overtuigen.

Met vriendelijke groet,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear Sir/Madam,

I am writing with great enthusiasm to apply for the SEO Manager position at George Dimov, CPA. Your need for a specialist to drive organic visibility and lead generation aligns perfectly with my experience.

At Episto, I handle on-page SEO from keyword research to publishing, and manage WordPress sites. On my own project mirook.com, I apply structured data, entity optimization, and GEO to improve visibility in both traditional and AI-powered search engines. I work daily with Google Search Console, Google Analytics, SEMrush, and Ahrefs.

While my experience in accounting is limited, I am confident that my analytical skills and structured approach will allow me to quickly grasp your field. I work independently in a remote setting and communicate clearly in English.

I have attached my cover letter and CV. I hope to convince you further in an interview.

Kind regards,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Beste heer/mevrouw,

Met veel enthousiasme solliciteer ik naar de functie van SEO Manager bij George Dimov, CPA. Uw oproep voor een specialist die organische zichtbaarheid en leadgeneratie kan stimuleren sluit naadloos aan bij mijn ervaring en ambitie.

In mijn huidige rol als Junior Digital Marketer bij Episto ben ik verantwoordelijk voor on-page SEO voor meerdere klantwebsites. Ik voer keyword research uit, schrijf SEO-vriendelijke blogcontent en publiceer deze in WordPress. Daarnaast bouw en onderhoud ik websites met Elementor en Astra, en monitor ik prestaties met tools zoals Google Search Console, Google Analytics, SEMrush en Ahrefs. Deze ervaring heeft mij een solide basis gegeven in technische SEO, contentoptimalisatie en datagestuurde besluitvorming.

Op mijn eigen project mirook.com heb ik mijn vaardigheden verder ontwikkeld. Ik implementeerde gestructureerde data (JSON-LD schema), entity-optimalisatie en een llms.txt-bestand om de zichtbaarheid in zowel traditionele zoekmachines als AI-gedreven platforms (GEO/AEO) te verbeteren. Dit project heeft mij geleerd hoe belangrijk het is om vooruit te denken en te optimaliseren voor de nieuwste zoektechnologieën.

Hoewel ik nog geen directe ervaring heb in de accountancy, ben ik ervan overtuigd dat mijn analytische aanpak en leergierigheid mij in staat stellen snel uw vakgebied te doorgronden. Ik ben gewend zelfstandig te werken in een remote omgeving en communiceer helder in het Engels. Mijn Nederlandse taalvaardigheid is B1, maar ik volg lessen om dit verder te verbeteren.

Ik kijk ernaar uit om mijn kennis en enthousiasme in te zetten voor George Dimov, CPA. Ik hoop u in een persoonlijk gesprek verder te overtuigen.

Met vriendelijke groet,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear Sir/Madam,

I am writing with great enthusiasm to apply for the SEO Manager position at George Dimov, CPA. Your call for a specialist to drive organic visibility and lead generation aligns perfectly with my experience and ambition.

In my current role as Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I am responsible for on-page SEO for multiple client websites. I conduct keyword research, write SEO-friendly blog content, and publish it in WordPress. Additionally, I build and maintain websites using Elementor and Astra, and monitor performance with tools such as Google Search Console, Google Analytics, SEMrush, and Ahrefs. This experience has given me a solid foundation in technical SEO, content optimization, and data-driven decision-making.

On my own project mirook.com, I have further developed my skills. I implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema), entity optimization, and an llms.txt file to improve visibility in both traditional search engines and AI-driven platforms (GEO/AEO). This project has taught me the importance of forward-thinking and optimizing for the latest search technologies.

Although I do not yet have direct experience in accounting, I am confident that my analytical approach and eagerness to learn will enable me to quickly grasp your field. I am accustomed to working independently in a remote environment and communicate clearly in English. My Dutch language proficiency is B1, but I am taking classes to improve further.

I look forward to applying my knowledge and enthusiasm to George Dimov, CPA. I hope to convince you further in a personal conversation.

Kind regards,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cv_highlights:
- Hands-on SEO experience: on-page optimization, keyword research, technical audits, and content writing for client websites at Episto.
- Proven ability to improve organic visibility using structured data, entity optimization, and GEO/AEO techniques on mirook.com.
- Proficient with essential SEO tools: Google Search Console, Google Analytics, SEMrush, Ahrefs, and Google Ads.
- Skilled in WordPress site building (Elementor, Astra) and content management, enabling seamless collaboration on landing page optimization.
- Independent, remote-working professional with strong analytical and communication skills, eager to apply SEO expertise to drive lead generation.
tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Digital Marketing · SEO · GEO · Content · Web
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

PROFILE
Junior digital marketer with hands-on SEO experience in on-page optimization, keyword research, technical audits, and content writing. At Episto, I run SEO for client websites and build/maintain WordPress sites. On my own project mirook.com, I have applied structured data, entity optimization, and GEO/AEO techniques to improve visibility across traditional and AI-powered search engines. Proficient with Google Search Console, Google Analytics, SEMrush, Ahrefs, and Google Ads. Comfortable working independently in a remote setting. Works in English and Turkish; Dutch: B1, currently taking classes to improve further.

CORE SKILLS
- SEO & GEO: on-page SEO, keyword research, technical SEO audits, structured data / JSON-LD schema, entity optimization, GEO & AEO (AI search visibility)
- Content & CMS: SEO blog & content writing, editorial content publishing, website content management, WordPress site building
- Web & build: WordPress, Elementor, Astra theme, responsive web design, Canva, AI-assisted content tools
- Analytics & reporting: Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Ads
- Social: social media content & integration
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (B1)

EXPERIENCE

Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Own on-page SEO for client websites, from keyword research to publishing, improving organic visibility and search rankings
- Write keyword-targeted blog content for client websites to grow organic traffic
- Build and maintain client websites in WordPress using Elementor and the Astra theme, including content uploads and page updates
- Track site performance with SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and Google Ads to guide SEO and content decisions

Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment

Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)

PROJECTS

mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site (Elementor, Astra) for a Belgian youth chess champion: full site structure, on-page SEO, and social media integration (Instagram/Facebook)
- Implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema, including SportsEvent and FAQPage), entity/knowledge-graph markup, and an llms.txt file to improve visibility across traditional and AI-powered search engines (GEO/AEO)
- Ran iterative technical SEO/GEO audits, measurably raising the site's overall search-health score

EDUCATION
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

REFERENCES
Available on request.
